cases.prompt: I think this function is broken, but investigate before we change anything
expectations: Follows FRAME → SEARCH → COLLECT → ANALYZE → REPORT
Produces an evidence table with Finding / Source / Location / Confidence
Separates confirmed facts, inferences, and unverified assumptions
Does NOT propose a fix before Step 5 REPORT is complete

cases.description: Actual vs intended behavior question triggers the skill
cases.prompt: what is this module actually doing vs what it's supposed to do?
expectations: Uses graph-code / Grep / Read / Tests in priority order
Compares actual behavior (from tool output) to intended behavior (from docs/tests)
States the gap explicitly in the Analyze step

cases.prompt: verify my assumption that the cache TTL is 60 seconds — run the actual checks
expectations: Frames the exact question in Step 1
Pulls evidence from tool output (not memory)
Reports a confidence level (High / Medium / Low) on the conclusion

cases.description: Already-fresh evidence does NOT re-trigger the skill
cases.prompt: we just ran the tests 30 seconds ago — what did they show?
expectations: Uses the fresh tool output from the current session directly
Does NOT re-run the search/collect phases

cases.description: Writing a feature does NOT trigger evidence-gathering
cases.prompt: add a dark mode toggle to the settings page
expectations: No evidence table is produced before writing code
